sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: APi Group (NYSE:APG) Sees Large Volume Increase - Time to Buy?
feed.summary: APi Group (NYSE:APG) experienced a significant 126% surge in trading volume, reaching over 6 million shares, alongside a stock price increase to $46.88. This heightened interest follows positive analyst sentiment, with several brokers raising price targets and the company maintaining a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating after an earnings beat and strong revenue growth. Despite recent insider selling totaling over $152 million, insiders still hold a substantial 17% stake, while institutional investors own 86.62% of the company.

feed.title: Absci (NASDAQ:ABSI) Stock Price Up 11% - Still a Buy?
feed.summary: Absci (NASDAQ:ABSI) shares rose 11% on Friday, despite missing quarterly earnings and revenue expectations significantly. The company operates with a negative net margin and analysts forecast a negative EPS for the fiscal year, leading to a consensus "Hold" rating with an average price target of $6.44. Insider ownership is 10.49% (including a recent purchase by Andreas Busch) and institutional ownership is approximately 52%.

feed.title: Alcoa Nears Sale of New York Smelter Site to NYDIG: Bloomberg
feed.summary: Alcoa Corp is reportedly close to selling its former Massena East smelter site in upstate New York to NYDIG, a digital asset firm, for repurposing into a data center. This potential deal follows a trend of closed industrial sites, particularly those with existing grid connections and high electricity capacity, being acquired by Bitcoin mining and high-performance computing companies like TeraWulf. Alcoa CEO Bill Oplinger expects the sale to close by mid-year.

feed.title: A Look at PulteGroup Inc (PHM) After 5.0% Gain -- GF Value $117.56 vs Price $126.53
feed.summary: PulteGroup Inc (PHM) shares recently rose 5.0%, bringing its price to $126.53, which is 7.6% above its GF Value™ of $117.56, indicating it is overvalued. The company boasts a strong GF Score™ of 96/100, driven by high profitability and financial strength, yet has seen significant insider selling totaling $25.1 million in the last three months with no reported buying, signaling potential caution for investors. Its current P/E ratio is also significantly higher than its historical median.

feed.title: Albemarle Corporation (ALB) Announces Retirement of Chief Accounting Officer Donald J. LaBauve Jr. to Retire After Over 36 Years of Service
feed.summary: Albemarle Corporation (ALB) announced the retirement of its Chief Accounting Officer, Donald J. LaBauve Jr., effective June 1, 2026, after over 36 years of service. His retirement is not due to any disagreements regarding the company's accounting practices. Albemarle plans to announce a succession plan and maintain financial integrity during this leadership transition.

feed.title: American Airlines says it’s not interested in merger with United Airlines
feed.summary: American Airlines has stated it is not interested in a merger with United Airlines, despite United's CEO having floated the idea to President Trump. American believes such a combination would be detrimental to competition and consumers, and inconsistent with antitrust principles. The potential merger arises amidst rising jet fuel prices and industry consolidation discussions, with American's shares falling following their statement.

feed.title: Nasdaq flags Arbe Robotics (NASDAQ: ARBE) for sub-$1 bid price risk
feed.summary: Arbe Robotics received a notice from Nasdaq stating its shares no longer meet the minimum $1 bid price requirement. The company has 180 calendar days, until October 12, 2026, to regain compliance, with a potential extension if certain conditions are met, possibly through a reverse stock split. While the notice does not immediately affect trading, failure to comply could lead to delisting.

feed.title: Apogee Therapeutics (APGE) CFO sells 2,000 shares under 10b5-1 plan

This transaction was conducted under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted on September 2, 2025. After the sale, Henderson directly holds 175,371 shares of Apogee common stock.

feed.title: One of the last buffets on the Las Vegas Strip is closing soon
feed.summary: The MGM Grand Buffet on the Las Vegas Strip is scheduled to close on May 31, significantly reducing the number of remaining buffets on the Strip to about a half-dozen. This closure reflects a broader trend of declining buffet popularity, influenced by post-pandemic health concerns and a shift in dining preferences towards food halls, particularly among younger generations. This news follows another recent closure by MGM Resorts International, Le Cirque at Bellagio, indicating a strategic shift in their dining offerings.

feed.title: ALX Oncology (NASDAQ: ALXO) awards 800,000 options to chief officer
feed.summary: ALX Oncology Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: ALXO) has granted its Chief Development & Operating Officer, Jeff E. Knight, 800,000 stock options with an exercise price of $1.68 per share and an expiration date of April 15, 2036. The options will vest one-fourth on April 13, 2027, with the remainder vesting in equal monthly installments over the subsequent three years. This grant increases Knight's direct holdings to 800,000 stock options.

feed.title: Shareholders of Alzamend Neuro (ALZN) approve board slate, plans and reverse split
feed.summary: Alzamend Neuro, Inc. shareholders approved all seven proposals at their annual meeting, including the election of seven directors, ratification of Haskell & White LLP as independent auditor, and an advisory on executive compensation. Key approvals included the 2025 Stock Incentive Plan, equity issuances for compliance, and authorization for a flexible reverse stock split. The reverse stock split authority allows the board to implement a ratio between one-for-two and one-for-ten by April 16, 2027, to manage share price and capital structure.

feed.title: Texas Instruments (TXN) Announces Results of Annual Stockholders Meeting
feed.summary: Texas Instruments (TXN) recently held its annual stockholders meeting on April 16, 2026, where the Board of Directors was elected and various proposals were voted upon. The successful election of the board and stockholder engagement highlight the company's commitment to strong corporate governance and driving long-term value. This announcement underscores the confidence stockholders have in TI's leadership and strategic direction as it continues to innovate and expand.

feed.title: American Airlines Says It Won’t Merge With United
feed.summary: American Airlines has dismissed the idea of merging with United Airlines, stating that such a combination would be detrimental to competition and consumers. This declaration comes after reports that United's CEO, Scott Kirby, had discussed the merger concept with the Trump administration. Aviation experts believe the proposal would face significant regulatory and antitrust challenges due to the highly consolidated nature of the airline industry.

feed.title: Simon Property Group, Inc. (NYSE:SPG) Short Interest Update
feed.summary: Short interest in Simon Property Group (NYSE:SPG) significantly increased by 31.2% in March, reaching over 7.1 million shares, indicating a short-interest ratio of 3.5 days. Despite this surge in short interest, the company's shares climbed to a 12-month high after beating quarterly earnings expectations with $3.49 EPS and a 13.2% year-over-year revenue increase. Simon Property Group also announced a quarterly dividend and a $2.0 billion share repurchase program, while institutional investors have adjusted their positions, and analysts have issued mixed ratings with an average target price of $200.14.

feed.title: Qualcomm Recommends Stockholders Reject Mini-Tender Offer by Tutanota LLC
feed.summary: Qualcomm has advised its stockholders to reject an unsolicited "mini-tender" offer from Tutanota LLC to purchase a small percentage of its common stock. Qualcomm states it has no association with Tutanota and highlights that the offer price is conditioned on Qualcomm's stock price exceeding the offer price, meaning stockholders could receive a below-market price. The company also points out that mini-tender offers avoid many SEC disclosure requirements, offering less investor protection.

feed.title: Lightning Round: Buy Vertex Pharmaceuticals
feed.summary: Jim Cramer, host of "Mad Money," recommends buying Vertex Pharmaceuticals. He also provided his views on Oddity Tech, ImmunityBio, Aehr Test Systems, and Copart. This lightning round segment highlights his quick takes on various stocks.

feed.title: Apple defeats bid for new Apple Watch import ban at US trade tribunal
feed.summary: A U.S. trade tribunal has ruled in favor of Apple, rejecting Masimo's attempt to reinstate an import ban on Apple Watches. The decision follows an ITC judge's preliminary ruling that Apple's redesigned watches do not infringe on Masimo's blood-oxygen reading technology patents. This ruling allows Apple to continue offering its health features while Masimo considers an appeal and pursues other legal avenues.
